title: FCDO: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings, October to December 2022
body: "The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) publishes details of special advisers’ meetings with senior media figures and any gifts or hospitality they received every 3 months.   This data is also on data.gov.uk: Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings.  "
